name: mochi-cards
title: Mochi Cards
description: Generate Mochi flashcards from reusable Markdown templates and AI fields.
author: sergey_balyakin

preferences.name: mochiApiKey
preferences.title: Mochi API Key
preferences.description: API key used to send generated cards to Mochi.

commands.name: generate-card
commands.title: Create Card
commands.description: Generate a Mochi card from a reusable template.

commands.name: manage-templates
commands.title: Manage Templates
commands.description: Create and manage reusable Mochi card templates.

commands.name: browse-cards
commands.title: Browse Cards
commands.description: Browse cards in selected Mochi decks.
